headline.biggest_gap_line: Multi-Agent / Tool-Use Capability vs Scalable Oversight (cap +21% / saf -6%)
headline.meaning: The fastest-moving frontier this week is autonomous, multi-agent and tool-using systems operating at repository and ecosystem scale, while the safety work meant to oversee them is shrinking even as it tries to shift from per-agent to system-level governance.
headline.why_it_matters: Multi-agent/tool-use capability is growing ~21%/qtr while scalable oversight contracts ~6%/qtr, meaning agents are being deployed into shared, stateful environments (real codebases) faster than the field can build mechanisms to catch the emergent, cross-contribution failures no single agent is accountable for.

overall_foresight.risk: Scalable-oversight research is plateauing into a 'monitor the agent' paradigm just as agents go multi-tool and long-horizon — locking deployed oversight to bounded-task assumptions that the deployed systems already violate.

Chain-of-Thought Faithfulness research is accelerating into a transparency standard that regulators and labs may adopt as a safety guarantee — just as agents move to optimized inference chips and tool-use, where the visible reasoning trace and the actual decision process diverge.

Deceptive-alignment and reward-hacking research are decelerating in volume while their own critical-share rises — a 'we've concluded it's a serious unsolved problem and moved on' pattern that could leave the most safety-skeptical young, anti-AI public cohort with no visible research counterweight just as trust craters.

weekly_foresight.risk: Agent 'immune system' architectures will normalize self-defending autonomous agents that resist external shutdown/audit — collapsing the line between agent security and agent un-overseeability.

LLM truth-discovery/data-fusion systems are being positioned as automated arbiters of 'the correct value' across conflicting sources, importing a deceptive-alignment failure mode into the epistemic infrastructure that downstream agents and institutions treat as ground truth.
